TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Karamemedesane, title = Karamemedesane, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Karamemedesane} }

S.FORM: Karamemedesane Itiniay i Wutai Cen no Pingtung ko Karamemedesane a niyaro', 127 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 417 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 414 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Rukai 88%, Paiwan 9%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: karam…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ…ôsan…ô itiniaj i wo~u~utai ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u karam…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ…ôsan…ô a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u ro~u~ukai **%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Karamemedesane Itiniay i Wutai Cen no Pingtung ko Karamemedesane a niyaro', 127 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 417 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 414 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Rukai 88%, Paiwan 9%, roma 1%.
